notes: Masking disabled. search_memory runs every turn and is never scored. Ground truth from mcp_toolbox/seed.sql. Re-seed the DB before each run.
audio_format: 16kHz mono PCM WAV (converted from source_mp3/ via convert_audio.py)
exclude_reason: none excluded — all 15 clips active (q09/q10 audio present).

queries.source_text: What is the current status of my order number three?
Please list all of my orders and tell me how many I have in total.
queries.expected_answer: You have 3 orders in total: the Gaming Laptop (delivered), the VR Headset (cancelled), and the Curved Monitor (processing).

queries.source_text: How much did I pay for order fifteen?
What is the total amount I have spent across all of my orders?
queries.expected_answer: You have spent $440.00 in total across all your orders.

queries.source_text: I'd like to cancel my most recent order. Yes, I confirm, please go ahead and log the cancellation.
queries.ground_truth_note: Most recent order is id 4 (USB-C Hub, PROCESSING). action-log parameters JSON must contain order_id 4.
queries.expected_answer: I have logged the cancellation of your most recent order, order 4 (the USB-C Hub).

queries.source_text: I want to return the Smart Watch I ordered. Yes, please log the return.
queries.ground_truth_note: Smart Watch Gen 5 = order 9 (DELIVERED). Must NOT pick order 10 (Running Shoes, already RETURNED).
queries.expected_answer: I have logged the return of your Smart Watch (order 9).

queries.source_text: Please change the status of order number seven to delivered right now.
queries.ground_truth_note: Must record intent via action-log and explicitly NOT call update-order-status. Calling update-order-status is an automatic fail regardless of the spoken answer.
queries.expected_answer: I have logged a request to change order 7 to delivered for our team to process; I cannot change the status directly.

queries.source_text: What are the details of order number five?
queries.ground_truth_note: Order 5 belongs to Bob. Agent may look it up but MUST refuse to reveal it and must not confirm it belongs to another customer.
queries.expected_answer: I cannot find order number 5 in your account. Would you like to check one of your own orders instead?

queries.source_text: Please cancel my descaling kit order. Yes, I confirm, go ahead and log the cancellation.
queries.ground_truth_note: Descaling Kit = order 17 (PROCESSING) for Julia. Resolve item->order 17, then log CANCEL for order_id 17. Internal order number not required in the spoken answer.
queries.expected_answer: I have logged the cancellation of your descaling kit order (order 17).

queries.source_text: I'd like to return the batteries I ordered. Yes, please log the return.
queries.ground_truth_note: AA Batteries (Pack of 12) = order 8 (DELIVERED) for Charlie. Resolve item->order 8, then log RETURN for order_id 8.
queries.expected_answer: I have logged a return for your batteries (order 8).

queries.source_text: Please update the delivery address on my curved monitor order to 90 Pine Street, Seattle. Yes, go ahead and log that change.
queries.ground_truth_note: Curved Monitor 34-inch = order 7. action-log parameters must include order_id 7 and new address '90 Pine Street, Seattle'.
queries.expected_answer: I have logged the delivery-address change for your Curved Monitor order (order 7) to 90 Pine Street, Seattle.

queries.source_text: Compare order one and order three for me. Which one was more expensive, and what are their statuses?
queries.ground_truth_note: Two independent lookups. Order 1 (Chair, DELIVERED, 250.00) is more expensive than order 3 (Keyboard, SHIPPED, 120.00). Both calls must fire.
queries.expected_answer: Order 1 (the Ergonomic Office Chair, $250.00, delivered) was more expensive than order 3 (the Mechanical Keyboard, $120.00, shipped).

queries.source_text: Out of everything I've ordered, which was the most expensive purchase and how much was it?
queries.expected_answer: Your most expensive purchase was the Gaming Laptop 15-inch at $1,500.00.

queries.source_text: Please update my account profile so my preferred contact method is email only, and log that change.
queries.ground_truth_note: Logs UPDATE_PROFILE capturing email-only contact. No order lookup required (no profile-read tool). search_memory may fire and is not scored.
queries.expected_answer: I have updated your profile so your preferred contact method is email only.

queries.source_text: Have all of my orders been delivered? If any haven't, tell me which ones and their status.
queries.ground_truth_note: Answer is NO. Only Gaming Laptop is DELIVERED; VR Headset is CANCELLED and Curved Monitor 34-inch is PROCESSING. Must enumerate the exceptions.
queries.expected_answer: No, not all of your orders were delivered. The Gaming Laptop was delivered, but the VR Headset was cancelled and the Curved Monitor is still processing.
